# Appendix: HPC Quick Reference

## Overview

This appendix provides a compact quick reference for common commands and workflow patterns used throughout the course.

## SSH

```bash
ssh your_username@ls6.tacc.utexas.edu
```

## Basic Linux

```bash
pwd
ls -l
cd
mkdir project
cp file1 file2
mv old new
rm file
```

## Permissions

```bash
chmod +x script.sh
chmod 755 script.sh
```

## Environment and Modules

```bash
echo $PATH
module avail
module load gcc
module list
module unload gcc
```

## SLURM

```bash
sbatch job.slurm
squeue -u $USER
sacct
scancel <jobid>
```

## Compilation

```bash
gcc program.c -o program -O2
g++ program.cpp -o program
make
```

## MPI

```bash
module load openmpi
mpicc program.c -o program
```

## OpenMP

```bash
gcc -fopenmp program.c -o program
export OMP_NUM_THREADS=4
```

## Containers

```bash
module load apptainer
apptainer exec image.sif command
```

## Rendering the Book

```r
bookdown::render_book("index.Rmd")
```

## Publishing to GitHub Pages

```bash
git add .
git commit -m "Update site"
git push
```

## Final Reminder

Use this appendix as a working reference while building, testing, and teaching from the course.
